one_time_description: Correction of errors added to accumulated surplus at beginning of year (Note 15)
economic_notes: Nation has 20% interest in a choomEEnsh a Nlaka'pamux Limited Partnership (revenues $11.16M, net income $5.5M for year ended Dec 31, 2023). Also holds interests in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (17.9%) and related entities. Kahmoose Construction Inc. is a fully consolidated subsidiary.
notes: 2023 comparatives restated due to correction of errors (Note 15) adding $509,771 to opening accumulated surplus. Nation business entities use December 31 year-end (fiscal lag). Restricted cash estimated as trust funds $419,484 + operating reserve $7,483 + replacement reserve $34,326 = $461,293. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $3,523,316 + ISC deferred $215,280 + Province of BC $777,697 + Fraser Thompson Indian Services Society $270,252 + CMHC $232,129 + First Nations Education Steering Committee $125,106 + First Nations Health Authority $119,340 + Fraser Health Authority $30,000 + ASETS $15,965 + BC First Nations Gaming Revenue $405,372 + ISC revenue deferred already included = sum of government sources. osr includes contracting income, other income, taxation, rental income, interest income, and earnings from Nation business entities.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
